finding_info.desc: Contractual arrangements with ICT third-party service providers shall be set out in writing and include, at minimum, agreed service levels and clear allocation of rights and obligations. finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall put in place a comprehensive ICT business continuity policy, including ICT response and recovery plans, that ensures the continuity of ICT-supported critical or important functions. Operational alarming, automated event routing and tested recovery actions are essential.

checks.desc: **AWS Backup** in the account/region includes at least one **backup vault** that stores and organizes recovery points for use by backup plans and copies.

message: No Backup Vault exist.
status_detail: No Backup Vault exist.

requirement_attributes.article_title: Backup policies and procedures, restoration and recovery procedures and methods

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall develop and document backup policies and procedures specifying the scope of data subject to backup and the minimum frequency of the backup, as well as restoration and recovery procedures and methods. Backups must be encrypted, retained, and resources must be designed for recoverability across availability zones and regions.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art12

checks.desc: **AWS Backup** in the account/region includes at least one **backup vault** that stores and organizes recovery points for use by backup plans and copies.
checks.name: At least one AWS Backup vault exists

compliance.control: Financial entities shall develop and document backup policies and procedures specifying the scope of data subject to backup and the minimum frequency of the backup, as well as restoration and recovery procedures and methods. Backups must be encrypted, retained, and resources must be designed for recoverability across availability zones and regions.

message: CloudFront Distribution E9RGNANRAOBK0 viewers can use HTTP or HTTPS.
status_detail: CloudFront Distribution E9RGNANRAOBK0 viewers can use HTTP or HTTPS.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall use and maintain updated ICT systems, protocols and tools that are appropriate to the magnitude of operations supporting ICT functions, technologically resilient, and adequately equipped to securely process data. Cryptographic primitives, certificate hygiene and network segmentation are core to this requirement.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art7

checks.desc: CloudFront distributions require viewer connections over **HTTPS** when the default cache behavior `viewer_protocol_policy` is `https-only` or `redirect-to-https`. Configurations that use `allow-all` permit HTTP.
checks.name: CloudFront distribution has viewer protocol policy set to HTTPS only or redirect to HTTPS

compliance.control: Financial entities shall use and maintain updated ICT systems, protocols and tools that are appropriate to the magnitude of operations supporting ICT functions, technologically resilient, and adequately equipped to securely process data. Cryptographic primitives, certificate hygiene and network segmentation are core to this requirement.

message: CloudFront Distribution E9RGNANRAOBK0 has logging disabled.
status_detail: CloudFront Distribution E9RGNANRAOBK0 has logging disabled.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process to detect, manage and notify ICT-related incidents. Comprehensive trail logging, log integrity protection, retention and centralisation of ICT events are foundational requirements.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art17

checks.desc:
**CloudFront distributions** record viewer requests using **standard access logs** (S3), **real-time log configurations**, or **Standard Logging v2** via CloudWatch Logs delivery sources.

The finding evaluates whether at least one logging mechanism is active so request metadata is captured for each distribution.
checks.name: CloudFront distribution has logging enabled

compliance.control: Financial entities shall define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process to detect, manage and notify ICT-related incidents. Comprehensive trail logging, log integrity protection, retention and centralisation of ICT events are foundational requirements.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall develop and document backup policies and procedures specifying the scope of data subject to backup and the minimum frequency of the backup, as well as restoration and recovery procedures and methods. Backups must be encrypted, retained, and resources must be designed for recoverability across availability zones and regions.

checks.desc: **CloudFront distributions** are evaluated for an **origin group** configured with at least `2` origins to support automatic origin failover.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall use and maintain updated ICT systems, protocols and tools that are appropriate to the magnitude of operations supporting ICT functions, technologically resilient, and adequately equipped to securely process data. message: No CloudTrail trails are configured to log Amazon Bedrock API calls.
status_detail: No CloudTrail trails are configured to log Amazon Bedrock API calls.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process to detect, manage and notify ICT-related incidents. Comprehensive trail logging, log integrity protection, retention and centralisation of ICT events are foundational requirements.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art17

checks.desc:
**At least one actively logging CloudTrail trail** records **Amazon Bedrock API activity** through management events or advanced event selectors targeting Bedrock resources.

This check covers **control-plane** operations such as configuration changes through CloudTrail management events and can also cover **data-plane** Bedrock events when advanced event selectors target Bedrock resource types.
checks.name: CloudTrail logs Amazon Bedrock API calls for security auditing

compliance.control: Financial entities shall define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process to detect, manage and notify ICT-related incidents. Comprehensive trail logging, log integrity protection, retention and centralisation of ICT events are foundational requirements.

message: DynamoDB table Testtable does not have deletion protection enabled.
status_detail: DynamoDB table Testtable does not have deletion protection enabled.

requirement_attributes.article_title: Backup policies and procedures, restoration and recovery procedures and methods

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall develop and document backup policies and procedures specifying the scope of data subject to backup and the minimum frequency of the backup, as well as restoration and recovery procedures and methods. Backups must be encrypted, retained, and resources must be designed for recoverability across availability zones and regions.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art12

checks.desc: **DynamoDB tables** have **deletion protection** enabled via the `deletion protection` setting, meaning delete operations require this setting to be disabled first
checks.name: DynamoDB table has deletion protection enabled

compliance.control: Financial entities shall develop and document backup policies and procedures specifying the scope of data subject to backup and the minimum frequency of the backup, as well as restoration and recovery procedures and methods. Backups must be encrypted, retained, and resources must be designed for recoverability across availability zones and regions.

message: EventBridge event bus default does not allow cross-account access.
status_detail: EventBridge event bus default does not allow cross-account access.

finding_info.desc: As part of the ICT risk management framework, financial entities shall have in place crisis communication plans enabling a responsible disclosure of ICT-related incidents or major vulnerabilities to clients, counterparts and the public. Reliable, encrypted and access-controlled notification channels are required.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art14

checks.desc:
**EventBridge event bus** has a **resource policy** that grants **cross-account event delivery** to principals outside the account, including broad or public access.

Focus is on buses whose policies permit external accounts to send events.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall have an ICT risk management framework that is sound, comprehensive and well-documented, enabling them to address ICT risk quickly, efficiently and comprehensively and to ensure a high level of digital operational resilience. This includes continuous configuration recording, security findings aggregation and an enterprise-wide visibility plane.

requirement_attributes.article_title: Classification of ICT-related incidents and cyber threats

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall classify ICT-related incidents and shall determine their impact based on criteria such as the number of clients affected, duration, geographical spread, data losses, and criticality of the services affected. Severity-aware threat detection across the estate underpins this classification.
finding_info.title: DORA-Art18

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall classify ICT-related incidents and shall determine their impact based on criteria such as the number of clients affected, duration, geographical spread, data losses, and criticality of the services affected. Severity-aware threat detection across the estate underpins this classification.

finding_info.desc: Financial entities shall have a sound, comprehensive and well-documented ICT internal governance and control framework. compliance.control: Financial entities shall have a sound, comprehensive and well-documented ICT internal governance and control framework. checks.desc:

checks.name: S3 bucket has cross-region replication configured to a bucket in a different region

compliance.control: Financial entities may exchange amongst themselves cyber threat information and intelligence, including indicators of compromise, tactics, techniques and procedures, cyber security alerts and configuration tools. Centralised threat detection, sensitive data discovery and trail-based intelligence enable participation in such information-sharing arrangements.
